title: Create: Creative Tools
description: A Create mod addon that adds 5 Nether Star upgrade recipes to convert regular devices into their creative-mode counterparts.
body:
# Create: Creative Tools 

A Create mod addon adding Nether Star upgrade recipes to convert regular devices into their creative-mode counterparts.

![C:CT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126af0a43b6732da6f939131e9ebc2815b983cd0.png)

## New 1.0.2+ 
Only support 1.21.1 Neoforge 

## Features 

- 6 recipes (5 upgrade + 1 Nether Star) 
- Recipes only — no custom blocks, no Java logic 
- Works on both client and server 

## Recipes 

### Creative Upgrades（8 Nether Stars + 1 item）

| Input | | Output |
|---|---|---|
| `create:fluid_tank` Fluid Tank | + 8×Nether Star | `create:creative_fluid_tank` Creative Fluid Tank |
| `create:hand_crank` Hand Crank | + 8×Nether Star | `create:creative_motor` Creative Motor |
| `create:item_vault` Item Vault | + 8×Nether Star | `create:creative_crate` Creative Crate |
| `create:extendo_grip` Extendo Grip | + 8×Nether Star | `create:handheld_worldshaper` Creative Worldshaper |
| `create:blaze_cake` Blaze Cake | + 8×Nether Star | `create:creative_blaze_cake` Creative Blaze Cake |

Pattern:
```
NNN
NXN  (N = Nether Star, X = input item)
NNN
```
Additionally, there is a hidde recipes in the mod.

![some creative tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01bbf7c1dad6f5a7c85735c46a6f90926ce386b.png)
![some creative tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc6aacd953c04ff7318d0341a006c5be63d38fe1.png)
![some creative tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07567726317b8ce04c4416f455e29cd2f0138a1e.png)
![some creative tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c06182083876330f9590aff2d506f16cfde68c1d.png)
![some creative tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f822272f340564c60a8abb1325a3357f95f2e645.png)

## Old 1.0.1- 

Support 1.21.1 Neoforge and Forge 

## Recipes

| Input | | Output |
|---|---|---|
| `create:fluid_tank` Fluid Tank | + Nether Star | `create:creative_fluid_tank` Creative Fluid Tank |
| `create:hand_crank` Hand Crank | + Nether Star | `create:creative_motor` Creative Motor |
| `create:item_vault` Item Vault | + Nether Star | `create:creative_crate` Creative Crate |
| `create:extendo_grip` Extendo Grip | + Nether Star | `create:handheld_worldshaper` Creative Worldshaper |
| `create:blaze_cake` Blaze Cake | + Nether Star | `create:creative_blaze_cake` Creative Blaze Cake |

Additionally, there is a hidde recipes in the mod.

![some creative tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de5f7f5e1b177c18ba5844ea1554b73f1f998708.png)

## Requirements

- Create 6.0+
